ce2c9bc72ab0.title: Pursue editorial recognition
ce2c9bc72ab0.description: Your operational scores support a credible submission to the AA Restaurant Guide or local food awards. Editorial recognition would differentiate you from peers and justify premium positioning.

485d036dd057.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
485d036dd057.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
485d036dd057.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

22d02d2d3fc2.title: Lean into service & hospitality — it's what guests are buying
22d02d2d3fc2.description: Guests consistently praise service & hospitality (5 positive mentions). This appears to be what the venue actually sells, whether or not it's what you think you sell. Make it the headline of your online presence.
22d02d2d3fc2.expected_upside: Sharpen proposition → attract the right guests
22d02d2d3fc2.management_implication: Your guests are telling you your proposition. Use it.

11f70b962a56.title: Solid score rests on thin evidence — more data could shift it
11f70b962a56.description: The overall score looks good but it's based on very limited review text. Collect TripAdvisor data and more Google reviews to confirm whether the position is real or artefact.
11f70b962a56.expected_upside: Validate the score before acting on it

578f97ccf8b7.title: Your quality supports a credible awards submission
578f97ccf8b7.description: Operational scores justify a submission to AA or local food awards. Editorial recognition would differentiate you from peers and support premium pricing.

f58774d7c2ad.title: Protect the 4.5/5 rating — it took years to build
f58774d7c2ad.description: With 1988 reviews at 4.5/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.

a4e7214b9acf.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
a4e7214b9acf.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
a4e7214b9acf.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

d14fef06089e.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
d14fef06089e.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.
